violations.text: Establishment does not have an individual with Rhode Island Manager Certified In Food Safety license. Multiple individuals have accredited manager food safety certificate. Application provided during time of inspection. Establishment to register. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2026
Dish machine was observed in poor repair (out of service prior to inspection). Establishment to use 3 bay sink to wash, rinse and sanitize all dishes. New Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2026
Prep sink basin juncture at top was observed in poor repair. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2026

Kitchen hood vents above grill area was observed with an accumulation of grease and soil residue. The physical facilities to be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2026
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Paper towels were added at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2025
The floor grout by the mop sink area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/07/2025
The condensate from the walk in refrigeration unit is freezing on the condenser. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 12/18/2023

The floors in the kitchen area is in poor repair. There are areas of low grout and broken tiles that must be repaired. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2024
